programme.title: Drive Tv: Launch Pad
programme.desc: (G) Sailing legend Jessica Watson joins Drive's Jess Morris for a day on Sydney's sparkling waterways before trading sails for wheels in the bold new CUPRA Terramar.

programme.title: Drive Tv: Launch Pad
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv: Vehicle Insights
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv: Launch Pad
programme.desc: (G) Luke returns to Lang Lang for deeper vehicle development, exploring how GWM engineers tune technology for harsh Aussie conditions and pushing advanced systems to their limits.
